rooms.name: Cell Block
rooms.description: Rows of broken prison cells line the damp stone walls.

events.data: The rusted cell doors hang open. Somewhere ahead, air moves through hidden cracks.

rooms.name: Guard Hall
rooms.description: A ruined guard post filled with cracked shields and scattered bones.

rooms.name: Bone Pit
rooms.description: A collapsed chamber where old prisoners were thrown and forgotten.

rooms.name: Torture Chamber
rooms.description: Broken chains hang from the ceiling above a stained stone floor.

rooms.name: Chain Vault
rooms.description: A hidden storage room packed with rusted shackles, old coins, and prison keys.

rooms.name: Hidden Escape Tunnel
rooms.description: A narrow tunnel slopes upward toward moonlit air and freedom.

events.data: You found the hidden escape tunnel. Freedom lies just beyond the darkness.
